metadata.instruction: Recover the file Task ID 79.jpg from Recycle Bin and verify whether it is restored to its previous location in Documents > Task 79 folder.
metadata.context: I accidentally deleted a file with the name Task ID 79.jpg.

l3.rationale: Typed a character to jump to the Recycle Bin item in the list.

l4.rationale: Opened Recycle Bin from the desktop/program manager and moved selection until Task ID 79 was highlighted.

l5.tag: Find deleted file in Recycle Bin
l5.rationale: Navigates within Recycle Bin to find the deleted Task ID 79.jpg before recovery.
